next_action: Release decision RESOLVED (tag stays v1.0.0, no users yet). gateway-startup follow-up FIXED this session. Remaining: vault.secrets pg_dump exclusion fix (task_bc952bb3, in progress in a separate session) — otherwise clear to run /kbd-new-phase.

note: PHASE COMPLETE + REFLECTED 2026-07-16. 6/6 changes archived; 5/6 goals fully MET, c006 MET-with-disclosed-partial-gate (see reflection.md). RELEASE DECISION RESOLVED same day: tag stays v1.0.0 (user call — no users yet, so no compatibility cost). GATEWAY-STARTUP FOLLOW-UP FIXED same day (task_2ea21856): root cause was NOT the originally-suspected flint_meta.views() defect — that function existed in source all along; the bug report was based on a stale local Docker image predating commit da7a24c by ~4.5 hours. After rebuilding correctly, views() worked, but a genuinely separate bug surfaced: RestCompiler's RPC route generator didn't account for Postgres function overloading (cron.schedule has 2-arg and 3-arg overloads), causing a router panic on duplicate route registration at startup. Fixed in crates/fdb-reflection/src/passes/endpoint_generation.rs (dedupe RPC routes by path) and crates/fdb-reflection/src/compilers/rest/rpc.rs (select_overload resolves the correct overload by arg-name match at call time). Verified end-to-end against a correctly-built image: gateway starts, /healthz returns 200. 6 new regression tests added (76/76 fdb-reflection tests pass), clippy+fmt clean, full workspace cargo check clean. Remaining open item: vault.secrets pg_dump exclusion (task_bc952bb3) — user started this in a separate session, not yet confirmed complete. Inherited debt from p15: 2/5 resolved this phase (native-change archiving, waypoint position currency), 1/5 improved-not-tooled (wait budget: 0/3 spent), 2/5 still open (artifact-refiner QA logs, staging k6) — worth an explicit decision before /kbd-new-phase.
